source_section.title_label_raw: General Variation Criteria Area of Applicability

provisions.heading_context_raw: Variation Criteria Area of Applicability
provisions.text: The variations contained within this Part only apply to the Centre Plan Area that is shown on Schedules B and C of the Charter, except for:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Variation Criteria Area of Applicability
provisions.text: those portions located within the Old South Suburb Heritage Conservation District;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Variation Criteria Area of Applicability
provisions.text: those portions located within the Barrington Street Heritage Conservation District; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Variation Criteria Area of Applicability
provisions.text: the following parcels of land:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Variation Criteria Area of Applicability

provisions.text: 00076109. Variation: Roof Edge Setbacks of Height-Exempted Building Rooftop Features

sections.title_label_raw: The minimum required roof edge setback for height-exempted

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required roof edge setback for height-exempted
provisions.text: The minimum required roof edge setback for height-exempted building rooftop features, contained in Section 103, may be varied by site plan approval to reduce the required setback.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required roof edge setback for height-exempted
provisions.text: When considering a site plan approval under Subsection 390(1), the following criteria shall be met:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required roof edge setback for height-exempted
provisions.text: the lot that is subject of the proposed site plan is located within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, DND, H, PCF, RPK, CDD-2, or CDD-1 zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required roof edge setback for height-exempted
provisions.text: the variation is to a roof edge that faces a side or rear lot line; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required roof edge setback for height-exempted
provisions.text: the rooftop feature is designed or buffered in such a way to minimize its potential visual impact. Variation: Streetwall Articulation

sections.title_label_raw: The requirements of Sections 359 or 360 may be varied by site

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Sections 359 or 360 may be varied by site
provisions.text: The requirements of Sections 359 or 360 may be varied by site plan approval to enable an alternative method of streetwall articulation.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Sections 359 or 360 may be varied by site
provisions.text: When considering a site plan approval under Subsection 391(1), the following criteria shall be met:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Sections 359 or 360 may be varied by site
provisions.text: an alternative method of streetwall articulation effectively contributes to the visual interest and appeal of the streetwall by providing public art and a minimum of one of the following:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Sections 359 or 360 may be varied by site
provisions.text: wider and more dramatic changes to projections or recesses than required under Sections 359 or 360, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Sections 359 or 360 may be varied by site
provisions.text: distinct curves or forms on the streetwall. Variation: Grade-Oriented Premises

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Clauses 123(1)(c), 144(1)(c), 170(1)(c),
provisions.text: The requirements of Clauses 123(1)(c), 144(1)(c), 170(1)(c), 189(1)(c), or 206(1)(c) may be varied by site plan approval for a grade-oriented premises to exceed a width of 24.0 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Clauses 123(1)(c), 144(1)(c), 170(1)(c),
provisions.text: When considering a site plan approval under Subsection 392(1), the following criteria shall be met:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Clauses 123(1)(c), 144(1)(c), 170(1)(c),
provisions.text: the proposal is within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, or COR zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Clauses 123(1)(c), 144(1)(c), 170(1)(c),
provisions.text: a minimum of two pedestrian entrances, no less than 12.0 metres apart, shall be provided;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Clauses 123(1)(c), 144(1)(c), 170(1)(c),
provisions.text: a minimum of three methods under Subsection 363(1) are provided for each pedestrian entrance; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Clauses 123(1)(c), 144(1)(c), 170(1)(c),
provisions.text: an alternative method is used within the streetwall to give the appearance that multiple storefronts are present, such as enhanced articulation and display windows. Variation: Maximum Building Dimensions in the CEN-2, COR, HR-2, or HR-1 Zone

sections.title_label_raw: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may
provisions.text: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may be varied by site plan approval to exceed a building width or building depth. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may
provisions.text: When considering a site plan approval under Subsection 393(1), the following criteria shall be met:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may
provisions.text: the lot that is the subject of the proposed site plan is located within a CEN-2, COR, HR-2, or HR-1 zone; and (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may
provisions.text: the massing of the building is broken up by changes in building form and design to make the building look like it consists of two or more distinct buildings, by:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may
provisions.text: providing an at-grade open space along the streetline,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may
provisions.text: limiting the building width or building depth of individual portions of a mid-rise building or a tall mid-rise building, above the streetwall, to a maximum of 64.0 metres, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1) may
provisions.text: separating portions of a mid-rise building or a tall mid-rise building located above the streetwall by a minimum distance of 10.0 metres. Variation: Unique Building Functionality

sections.title_label_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval to support the unique functional needs of the land uses listed under Clause 394(2)(b):

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: maximum front or flanking setbacks (Sections 113, 134, 160, or 179);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: maximum side setbacks (Subsection 135(6));

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: maximum streetwall height (Sections 117, 137, 164, 183, 200, 217, 258, 273, or 288);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minimum streetwall height (Sections 118, 138, 165, 184, 201, 218, 259, 274, or 289);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: streetwall stepbacks (Sections 119, 139, 166, 185, 202, 219, 260, 275, or 290);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: recessed portions and cantilevers within streetwalls (Sections 120, 141, 167, 186, 203, 220, 261, 276, or 291);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: streetwall articulation for buildings with a streetwall width 64.0 metres or less (Section 359);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: streetwall articulation for buildings with a streetwall width greater than 64.0 metres (Section 360);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: grade-oriented premises (Sections 123, 144, 170, 189, or 206);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: number of pedestrian entrances along streetwalls in an INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone (Section 365);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: side and rear stepbacks (Sections 125, 172, 191, 208, 223, 264, 279, or 294);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: maximum building dimensions, excluding tower portions (Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1));

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minimum separation distance requirement between a mid-rise typology and another mid-rise typology (Clauses 173(2.5)(a), 192(3)(a), 209(2.5)(a), 265(2.5)(a), or 295(2.5)(a)); (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minimum separation distance between a mid-rise typology and a tall mid-rise typology (Clauses 173(2.5)(b), 192(3)(b), 209(2.5)(b), 265(2.5)(b), or 295(2.5)(b)); or (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minimum separation distance requirement between a tall mid-rise typology and another tall mid-rise typology (Clauses 173(2.5)(d), 192(3)(c), 209(2.5)(d), 265(2.5)(d), or 295(2.5)(d)). (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: When considering a site plan approval under Subsection 394(1), the following criteria shall be met:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: the lot that is the subject of the proposed site plan is located within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: a minimum of 80% of the floor area of the building contains one or more of the following uses:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: community recreation use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: convention centre use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: cruise ship terminal use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: cultural use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: library use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: major spectator venue use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minor spectator venue use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: public building use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: religious institution use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: school use, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: university or college use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: the applicant demonstrates that each variation requested under Subsection 394(1) is needed to address conflicts with the intended use of the building; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: there are no blank walls facing a street or a park use. Variation: Unique Building Design

sections.title_label_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval to support unique and innovative building designs for the land uses listed under Clause 395(2)(b):

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: maximum front or flanking setbacks (Sections 113, 134, 160, or 179);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: maximum side setbacks (Subsection 135(6));

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: maximum streetwall height (Sections 117, 137, 164, 183, 200, 217, 258, 273, or 288);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minimum streetwall height (Sections 118, 138, 165, 184, 201, 218, 259, 274, or 289);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: streetwall stepbacks (Sections 119, 139, 166, 185, 202, 219, 260, 275, or 290);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: recessed portions and cantilevers within streetwalls (Sections 120, 141, 167, 186, 203, 220, 261, 276, or 291);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: streetwall articulation for buildings with a streetwall width 64.0 metres or less (Section 359);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: streetwall articulation for buildings with a streetwall width greater than 64.0 metres (Section 360);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: grade-oriented premises (Sections 123, 144, 170, 189, or 206);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: number of pedestrian entrances along streetwalls in an INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone (Section 365);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: side and rear stepbacks (Sections 125, 172, 191, 208, 223, 264, 279, or 294);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: maximum building dimensions, excluding tower portions (Subsections 174(1), 193(1), or 210(1));

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: projecting signs (Section 464);

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minimum separation distance requirement between a mid-rise typology and another mid-rise typology (Clauses 173(2.5)(a), 92(3)(a), 209(2.5)(a), 265(2.5)(a), or 295(2.5)(a));

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minimum separation distance requirement between a mid-rise typology and a tall mid-rise typology (Clauses 173(2.5)(b), 192(3)(b), 209(2.5)(b), 265(2.5)(b), or 295(2.5)(b)); (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minimum separation distance requirement between a tall mid-rise typology and another tall mid-rise typology (Clauses 173(2.5)(d), 192(3)(c), 209(2.5)(d), 265(2.5)(d), or 295(2.5)(d)); or (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: When considering a site plan approval under Subsection 395(1), the following criteria shall be met:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: the lot that is the subject of the proposed site plan is located within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: a minimum of 80% of the floor area of the building contains one or more of the following uses:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: community recreation use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: convention centre use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: cruise ship terminal use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: cultural use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: library use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: major spectator venue use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: minor spectator venue use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: public building use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: religious institution use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: school use, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: university or college use; the applicant demonstrates that each variation requested under Subsection 395(1) is needed to support a unique and innovative building design that emphasizes the site through the submission of information and architectural drawings that compare the building's design:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: under applicable requirements of this By-law without a variation, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: with the requested variation;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: there are no blank walls facing a street or a park use; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following requirements may be varied by site plan approval
provisions.text: an at-grade open space shall be provided along the streetline that is accessible to pedestrians and is a minimum of 5.0% of the total lot size. Variation: Cornice Line Height for New Main Buildings or Additions to Main Buildings on a Property Abutting a Registered Heritage Property or Abutting a Heritage Conservation District

sections.title_label_raw: The requirements of Section 381, may be varied by site plan

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Section 381, may be varied by site plan
provisions.text: The requirements of Section 381, may be varied by site plan approval to allow a cornice line of a new main building or an addition to a main building that:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Section 381, may be varied by site plan
provisions.text: commences higher than 2.0 metres above the cornice line of the building on the abutting registered heritage property or a building on the abutting heritage conservation district; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Section 381, may be varied by site plan
provisions.text: commences lower than 2.0 metres below the cornice line of the building on the abutting registered heritage property or a building on the abutting heritage conservation district.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Section 381, may be varied by site plan
provisions.text: When considering a site plan approval under Subsection 396(1), the following criteria shall be met:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Section 381, may be varied by site plan
provisions.text: the design of the building incorporates articulation established by vertical and horizontal architectural elements of the abutting registered heritage building or building within a heritage conservation district (e.g., windows, columns, pilasters, cornice, architectural frieze, storefront, datum lines, etc.); and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Section 381, may be varied by site plan
provisions.text: the design of the building incorporates the proportions and vertical spacing of the windows of the abutting registered heritage building or building within a heritage conservation district. Variation: Applicability of Design Requirements for Construction on a Registered Heritage Property Outside of a Heritage Conservation District

sections.title_label_raw: The requirements of Part VII, Chapters 3 and 5, and Part VIII,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Part VII, Chapters 3 and 5, and Part VIII,
provisions.text: The requirements of Part VII, Chapters 3 and 5, and Part VIII, Chapter 2, may be varied by site plan approval to address conflicts between building design requirements for new construction on a registered heritage property and applicable requirements under the Heritage Property Act.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Part VII, Chapters 3 and 5, and Part VIII,
provisions.text: When considering a site plan approval under Subsection 397(1), the following criteria shall be met:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Part VII, Chapters 3 and 5, and Part VIII,
provisions.text: the lot that is the subject of the proposed site plan is a registered heritage property located outside of a heritage conservation district; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The requirements of Part VII, Chapters 3 and 5, and Part VIII,
provisions.text: the requirement that is the subject of the site plan approval application conflicts with a requirement under the Heritage Property Act. Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors
